---
name: Parity Update
about: Report a drift between the template and actual Pi behavior

---

## What Changed in Pi

Describe the upstream Pi change (new docs, new runtime behavior, etc.).

## Current Template Behavior

What the template currently says or assumes.

## Correct Behavior

What the template should say to match the new Pi reality.

## Source Reference

Link to Pi docs, changelog, source, or example that confirms the change.
